feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Title
entry.summary:
Author: not-blonde-yet (stillredhead_just_tired)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,202Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 0

Summary: The universe has a funny way of balancing its books. For every week Buck spends being genuinely happy, life eventually decides it's time to correct the course. A trip to Nashville for the National Firefighter Games seemed like a nice break -until Buck runs into a ghost from his past: Dixie, the country singer he spent one summer with a decade ago.Or: the one where Buck wants a title, Eddie is terrible at feelings, and everyone at the Firefighter Games already thinks they're married.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My God, Love Is Embarassing As Hell
entry.summary:
Author: Thasminsno1fan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,102Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: But then a paddle goes up, and an oh-so-familliar voice follows. "Eight thousand and three."Buck's gaze quickly finds the redhead. Eddie tears his eyes away from Buck for the first time since he walked on the stage, because that voice sets alarm bells off in his mind."Going once, going twice… sold to the redhead back there! Wait, is that Taylor Kelly?"Eddie didn't need to hear that to know it's her. Clearly neither did Buck. There's a wicked smirk plastered on Taylor's face, and she sends a small wave in Buck's direction. Maddie raises her eyebrows at Eddie as he seems like he's about to boil over with… anger? jealousy? She wasn't too sure. She wasn't too surprised either.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: next time I know you'll call
entry.summary:
Author: bvckley

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,600Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: “I think you’re ready,” Buck says. “And with four days to go.”Eddie nods along, just because Buck looks so proud of himself, but he swallows, bracing for one more request.“Actually,” he starts. If he could bring himself to curse Maddie, this would be the moment. “There’s one more thing.”“What else?”Eddie takes a breath, then another as he gathers all the strength in himself. “The actual date.” Maddie really went beyond when she was standing her conditions. “Like, I don’t know what to talk about, how to act and all that stuff.” Embarrassment burns like fire in his lungs, radiating to his cheeks. “Could you… show me?” Or,Maddie has plotted a master plan. Eddie really wishes she just asked for money as her fee.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: pains of now are always past
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,710Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 139

Summary: “You have to look after Dad.”Buck frowns, eyes snapping to Eddie like he’s mortally wounded and hiding it from him.His dad laughs uncomfortably. “Chris. I thought you wanted to call Buck?”“I did. For you.” Or, everyone keeps dying. Christopher needs Buck to make sure that his dad doesn't die, too.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Late Night Conversations in a Motel in the Middle of Nowhere
entry.summary:
Author: youcantsaveeveryone

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,767Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: “I- Is this too uncomfortable? You know, we can always get a second room if you need your own bed.” Buck looked like he was trying to shrink himself down a little, suddenly very concerned that he was taking up too much of the bed. Eddie scoffed and sat upright. “Nah, just got too many thoughts to fall asleep. Besides, I don’t have second room money. I did recently spend $2,500 on myself in an auction. It’s austerity measures from here on out.” Buck laughed. Now that they were both sitting up in bed, he turned to face him. It suddenly felt like a sleepover, like they were sharing vulnerable secrets in the dead of night. Which is what probably possessed Buck to finally ask “You never told me, why’d you hate the idea of a date so much that you had to buy yourself? It’s not even a real date, just one night with a lovely lady and you’re done. Seems like at least something you might enjoy.” or In which Buck finally asks Eddie why he bid on himself, Buck thinks Eddie's dating Alex, and Eddie confesses some things.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 807,277Chapters: 82/?Kudos: 118

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 572,194Chapters: 75/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

entry.title: always answer the question
entry.summary:
Author: greyspilot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,308Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: He's not sure how to come out and confess that he's in love with his best friend without conflating the two. Sure, maybe one realization led to the other, but they're still two different statements. Eddie Diaz is a gay man. Eddie Diaz is in love with Evan Buckley.

entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,214Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 60

entry.title: Last chances and second glances
entry.summary:
Author: thebookofcrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 165,800Chapters: 49/60Kudos: 868

Summary: St. Anthony’s was his last chance, and Evan knew that. He had been kicked out of five schools in the past six years, and after his sophomore year ended with a meeting between his parents and his last headmaster that could be summarized with: “we’re not kicking him out, but just know that Evan is not welcome back in September.” His parents wanted to send him to military school.       Evan knew he couldn’t survive military school, that would be his last drop, the one that finally shattered the vase. He couldn’t be the type of person that would be able to put himself back together once they broke him down.     This had to work. . . . Buck is the new kid in an El Paso boarding school, trying his best to stay out of trouble. Eddie is a rockstar (in the world of high school popularity) he's captain to the football team, he's dating the most popular girl in school, and looking at a full ride sports scholarship in the fall. He should feel like he won at life, which is why he doesn't understand why the only time he feels alive is when he catches a glimpse of the new guy on the running team. Or in simpler terms: Buddie high-school AU!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: lost inside a memory of someone's life (it wasn't mine)
entry.summary:
Author: lifelessframe

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,181Chapters: 1/18Kudos: 8

Summary: Buck wrote them all a letter. One to Maddie, saying he loves her and he’s sorry. One to Hen, thanking her for always being there. One to Chim, asking him to take good care of himself and his family. One to Chris, explaining why he won’t be around anymore. And one to Eddie, which somehow ended up being the shortest. Or Buck tries to kill himself after Bobby’s death. Eddie is heartbroken, slightly seething, and he just doesn't understand.

entry.title: Versus
entry.summary:
Author: fallenandinlovewithhumanity

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,711Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 53

Summary: He’s been officially dropped from the UFC, and he feels good about it? His application to the LAFD is in it's last steps, he has a great boyfriend, kid, and even his ex-wife is supporting him. So when his parents want to be in Los Angeles for the holiday and he has to meet with his lawyer about a lawsuit, Eddie looks to his support system to work through it. But will they survive the media rollout of this lawsuit and their first family Christmas with Buck?   Note: This is part of a series, but you can read as stand-alone if you wish!

entry.title: astronomy in reverse (it was me who was discovered)
entry.summary:
Author: mmmikaela

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,878Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: Eddie gets a far-away look in his eyes before he shakes his head and says, “It was–it was for the orphans, man.” And Buck knows there’s more to it than that, but he can still see the rigidity in Eddie’s shoulders so he decides to try and lighten the mood. “So where are you going to take Maddie out?” Hesitating, Eddie says, “I wasn’t planning on taking her anywhere. I Venmoed her the money and figured that was that.” “What, is she not good enough to spend an evening with?” Buck asks with mock indignation. “You want me to take your married—to our captain, might I add—sister out?” “Well, she is kinda your type.” Eddie arches an eyebrow. “And what type is that?”Or, Buck learns why Eddie's been so reluctant to rejoin the dating pool.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Let the Games Begin
entry.summary:
Author: popcorn_squirrel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,929Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 145

Summary: “So, if he’s not your boyfriend, does that mean he’s single?”Eddie’s stomach churns at the question. “Um, well—”Tom cuts him off.“Do you think he’d say yes if I asked him out?”Eddie doesn't know why he does it. He just knows that the idea of this man, Tom, wanting to ask Buck out makes him feel like he's going to throw up, so before he can even think about it, he blurts out—“Oh, sorry, man, I just meant that he’s my husband, not my boyfriend.”or; When Buck and Eddie are in Nashville for the firefighter competition, Eddie accidentally tells one of the other firefighters that he and Buck are married. It goes about as well as you'd expect.

entry.title: The Buck Effect
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,640Chapters: 1/7Kudos: 1

Summary: Science has said that one singular event can ultimately result in later much larger consequences. Eddie Diaz discovers the truth of this when he meets Evan (Buck) Buckley, and the trajectory of his life changes forever. It’s 1920 and the Great War has ended. Eddie Diaz, with his son Christopher, make the decision to move from Texas to the growing metropolis of Los Angeles. Former Army medic Eddie has a new job, a new career and, he hopes, a new direction.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: our real family 💋⭐️
entry.summary:
Author: kennedyelizabeth

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,318Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 172

Summary: the 118 family, and their online activity!!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You'll Always Find Your Way Back Home
entry.summary:
Author: favrit5

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,398Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 208

Summary: Chris fiddles with his controller, then blurts, “I miss when you lived here.” The air changes, Buck’s breath catches, Eddie’s fingers tighten slightly against the couch cushion. An admission long in the works, settling between them. Something all three of them had secretly been thinking for months. “Yeah?” Buck asks, aiming for light but not quite hitting it. Or After learning his parents are getting a divorce, Buck goes to Eddie's, the one place he can always find comfort. There he realizes time is too short to wait for what you want.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: worth every buck
entry.summary:
Author: buckleyseddie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 66

Summary: “Hello, table for Buckley,” Eddie tells the waitress five minutes later. After a quick glance at her tablet, she leads him inside. It really is a nice place but Eddie was right about it being too romantic. He sees mostly couples having dinner as they make their way through the tables. The waiter probably thinks Eddie and Maddie are one of them. If only she knew Eddie is actually in love with her brother–“Here’s your table, sir,” the waitress says as Eddie stops to let a waiter carrying a tray of drinks pass. “I’ll come back shortly to take your order.”“Thank you–”“Eddie?”The voice sounds familiar, but it’s not the one he expects to hear. Confused, Eddie’s eyes snap to the table that he was shown to and finds Buck sitting there instead of Maddie.“Buck?”or after the bachelor auction Maddie tricks Eddie into going out on a date with a different Buckley

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Boots, Beers, and a Mirrorball Cowboy Hat
entry.summary:
Author: SeaOfBread

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,279Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: “Got you something,” Eddie says, sitting back down. Their shoulders brush as he settles on his stool, sending electricity shooting through Buck’s body. It’s then that he notices the hat Eddie’s holding, silver and covered in hundreds of tiny mirror pieces, resembling a disco ball. “What the hell is that?” he asks, huffing a laugh. “Found it on a table over there. You said you felt underdressed, but now you’ll fit right in.” Buck rolls his eyes, smiling despite himself. “Yeah, at a Taylor Swift concert maybe.” Eddie just shrugs, still grinning. “She’s from Nashville, isn’t she?” “True,” Buck resigns, and before he knows what’s happening, Eddie is placing the hat on top of his head.   Or: Buck and Eddie arrive in Nashville for the firefighter games and have a night out, leading to a number of truths being revealed. Ft. Buck going feral over cowboy Eddie and the introduction of a sparkly hat. Yes, this is based on that one still. You know the one.
